given: Sentry Seer grouping race-condition logging references new_has_group after conditional initialization

should_find.finding: _is_race_condition_skipped_event references new_has_group in logging even when initial_has_group skips the branch that assigns it, causing UnboundLocalError

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 67e046ae53ae26ec2e69ad0002d44e6d5dbffcda. _is_race_condition_skipped_event references new_has_group in logging even when initial_has_group skips the branch that assigns it, causing UnboundLocalError
